project.name: Retarget Fixture
project.description: Jawata-owned fixture for Sprint 22a P1-a.3 (retarget_call_sites): a Service with v1() and its replacement v2() (same signature), and a Client with two v1() call sites that a retarget should redirect to v2(). JRE-only, compiles clean before and after (v2 exists, v1's declaration stays).
